requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, and Networked Charger Readiness

summary.en: For any Saint Kitts and Nevis public, hotel, airport, port, fleet, or renewable-energy pilot charger that is networked, OCPP back-office support should be specified for remote monitoring, billing, fault handling, access control, and load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should follow IEC 61000-family expectations so charger emissions do not create feeder or site interference, and so the charger remains resilient to island-grid disturbances, lightning, and switching transients.
summary.zh: 对于圣基茨和尼维斯任何公共、酒店、机场、港口、车队或可再生能源试点中的联网充电桩，应规定支持OCPP后台，以实现远程监控、计费、故障处理、访问控制和负载管理。EMC和电能质量证据应遵循IEC 61000系列预期，确保充电桩发射不会造成馈线或场站干扰，并使充电桩能够抵御岛屿电网扰动、雷击和开关瞬态。
summary.zht: 對於聖基茨和尼維斯任何公共、酒店、機場、港口、車隊或可再生能源試點中的聯網充電樁，應規定支持OCPP後台，以實現遠程監控、計費、故障處理、訪問控制和負載管理。EMC和電能質量證據應遵循IEC 61000系列預期，確保充電樁發射不會造成饋線或場站干擾，並使充電樁能夠抵禦島嶼電網擾動、雷擊和開關瞬態。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office communication
IEC 61000 series — EMC, harmonics, immunity, and power-quality requirements
IEC 61851-24 — DC charger digital communication context
SKELEC / NEVLEC site power-quality and connection requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly rely on GB/T 27930 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system, while operator back-office functions may be proprietary or OCPP-based depending on the Chinese network. GB/T 27930 is not an OCPP back-office substitute and is not the CCS2 communication path expected for IEC deployments.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常依赖GB/T 27930在非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间通信，运营商后台功能则可能依据中国网络采用私有协议或OCPP。GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP后台，也不是IEC部署中CCS2预期的通信路径。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常依賴GB/T 27930在非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間通訊，運營商後台功能則可能依據中國網絡採用私有協議或OCPP。GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP後台，也不是IEC部署中CCS2預期的通訊路徑。

gap.en: Confirm the OCPP version, SIM or Ethernet connectivity, remote diagnostics, local payment or access-control integration, cybersecurity controls, and load-management functions before deployment. For EMC, provide IEC 61000 test reports covering emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, surge, electrostatic discharge, and fast transients. GB/T-only DC communication and a China-only back office will not be enough for an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 Saint Kitts and Nevis pilot.
gap.zh: 部署前须确认OCPP版本、SIM或以太网连接、远程诊断、本地支付或访问控制集成、网络安全控制和负载管理功能。EMC方面，应提供IEC 61000测试报告，覆盖发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪变、浪涌、静电放电和快速瞬变。仅支持GB/T直流通信和中国专用后台不足以支撑圣基茨和尼维斯IEC Type 2 / CCS2试点。
gap.zht: 部署前須確認OCPP版本、SIM或以太網連接、遠程診斷、本地支付或訪問控制集成、網絡安全控制和負載管理功能。EMC方面，應提供IEC 61000測試報告，覆蓋發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃變、浪涌、靜電放電和快速瞬變。僅支持GB/T直流通訊和中國專用後台不足以支撐聖基茨和尼維斯IEC Type 2 / CCS2試點。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory where required by the project owner, charge-point operator, utility connection review, public tender, payment system, or fleet-management specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 applies to China domestic DC charger communication and is not an OCPP or CCS2 interoperability substitute

source.publisher: St Kitts Electricity Company (SKELEC) and Nevis Electricity Company (NEVLEC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Networked Saint Kitts and Nevis chargers should be specified with OCPP and IEC 61000 evidence from the start. A China-only GB/T 27930 communication stack does not solve back-office integration, CCS2 interoperability, or EMC acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圣基茨和尼维斯联网充电桩应从一开始即规定OCPP和IEC 61000证据。中国专用GB/T 27930通信栈不能解决后台集成、CCS2互操作或EMC接受问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聖基茨和尼維斯聯網充電樁應從一開始即規定OCPP和IEC 61000證據。中國專用GB/T 27930通訊棧不能解決後台集成、CCS2互操作或EMC接受問題。
